generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, you know we can't afford to neglect civil defense. While some focus on flashy tech, real security comes from prepared communities. Local drills and stockpiles save lives - just ask the towns that weathered the 2024 Midwest blackouts without panic. Our military can't be everywhere, but we can all do our part. #CommunityResilience #DutyFirst
